meaning: adv.鏈夊笇鏈涘湴,鏈夊墠閫斿湴
examples: 'Are you free tonight?' she asked hopefully.
"Am I welcome?" He smiled hopefully, leaning on the door.
The festival seeks to resolve conflict, strengthen community bonds and hopefully, arrive at a greater peace.
"We have faith in the inquest, so hopefully we will get the answers, " he said.
